---
title: "Bargaining"
short-title: "Bargaining"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Rubinstein alternating-offers, Nash bargaining solution, and computational replicators."
keywords: ["bargaining", "Rubinstein", "Nash bargaining", "alternating offers"]
---

# Bargaining {#sec-bargaining}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
